onClick:
{{
  !inpCustomerName.text || !inpCustomerName.text.trim()
    ? showAlert("Customer name is required.", "warning")
    : (
        appsmith.store.customer_form_mode === "edit"
          ? updateCustomer.run()
          : saveCustomer.run()
      )
        .then(() => getCustomers.run())
        .then(() => storeValue("customer_form_mode", "add"))
        .then(() => storeValue("current_customer_id", null))
        .then(() => resetWidget("mdlCustomer", true))
        .then(() => showAlert("Customer saved. Ready for next customer.", "success"))
}}
